best_individual: sub(protected_div(if_then_else(is_water, distance, steepness), if_then_else(is_water, steepness, steepness)), neg(add(distance, steepness)))

hall_of_fame.individual: sub(protected_div(if_then_else(is_water, distance, steepness), if_then_else(is_water, steepness, steepness)), neg(add(distance, steepness)))
add(add(protected_pow(if_then_else(is_water, steepness, 0.314), sub(steepness, steepness)), distance), if_then_else(is_water, distance, steepness))
add(if_then_else(or_(is_water, is_water), 0.576, steepness), step_penalty_multiplier(distance, steepness, distance))
